languages.text: "Жизнь людей порой ужасна, и любой невольно может стать жертвой соблазнов Архиврага".
"The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."
languages.original_text: "Жизнь людей порой ужасна, и любой невольно может стать жертвой соблазнов Архиврага".

traits.locale_text: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."
"The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."
"The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."

languages.text: 「人間の生活は時に恐ろしいもので、誰でも無意識に敵の誘惑に陥る可能性がある」
languages.original_text: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."

languages.text: "İnsanların hayatları bazen dehşet vericidir. Herkes, bilmeden Şerbaşı'nın ayartmalarına kurban gidebilir."
languages.original_text: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanların hayatları bazen dehşet vericidir. Herkes, bilmeden Şerbaşı'nın ayartmalarına kurban gidebilir."

languages.text: “人类的生存常浸染于恐惧之中，任何人都可能在不知不觉间沦为混沌大敌诱惑的牺牲品。”
languages.original_text: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."

traits.locale_text: “人类的生存常浸染于恐惧之中，任何人都可能在不知不觉间沦为混沌大敌诱惑的牺牲品。”

languages.text: "Das Leben der Menschen ist mitunter erschreckend, und jeder kann unwissentlich Opfer der Versuchungen des Erzfeindes werden."
languages.original_text: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."

traits.locale_text: "Das Leben der Menschen ist mitunter erschreckend, und jeder kann unwissentlich Opfer der Versuchungen des Erzfeindes werden."

languages.text: « La vie des humains peut parfois être effroyable. N'importe qui peut, sans le savoir, devenir victime des tentations du Grand Ennemi. »
languages.original_text: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."

traits.locale_text: « La vie des humains peut parfois être effroyable. N'importe qui peut, sans le savoir, devenir victime des tentations du Grand Ennemi. »

languages.text: «La vida humana puede ser algo horrible, y cualquiera puede sucumbir a las tentaciones del Archienemigo».
languages.original_text: "The lives of humans are sometimes horrifying, and anyone can unwittingly fall victim to the Archenemy's temptations."

traits.locale_text: «La vida humana puede ser algo horrible, y cualquiera puede sucumbir a las tentaciones del Archienemigo».
